activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception activation and restricted verification rules
EU/European Union normalization and handling of extra EU origins

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation Bussgatan 1 50464, Borås Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CORPORATION SE-405 08 Göteborg Sweden
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' matches the invoice issuer 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION' after normalization of legal form and minor address deviations. The country 'Sweden' is consistent. Rule 4.1.0 on identification through occurrence in invoice and 4.1.3.6 on company legal form abbreviation were applied.

consignee.certificate_value: PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA JL RAYA CAKUNG CILINCING KAV.3A SEMPER TIMUR JAKARTA UTARA 14130 Indonesia
consignee.invoice_value: PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA Jl.Raya Cakung Cilincing Kav.3A 14130 JAKARTA Indonesia
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'PT. INDOTRUCK UTAMA' matches the buyer and ship-to party in the invoice after normalization of address formatting. The country 'Indonesia' matches exactly. No conflicting consignee found.

goods_description.motivation: LC exception active (rule 2.2) restricts verification to origin only. Goods description verification is not applicable.

quantity.motivation: Under the LC exception (rule 2.2), quantity verification is not applicable.

origin.certificate_value: European Union / The european community Sweden
origin.motivation: Certificate origin given as 'European Union' and 'The european community Sweden'. Invoice explicit 'Country of origin: SE' matches 'Sweden' under EU origin normalization. LC exception applies origin-only verification. The country is identified explicitly and matches certificate origins.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points verified successfully under LC exception. Consignor, consignee, and origin match with allowed normalizations. Quantity and goods description verification not applicable due to LC override.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter som kan verifieras enligt Letter of Credit-undantaget stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Certifikatet kan därför godkännas automatiskt.
